classes.name: kaya_module_sdk.src.testing.kit_reporter.KITR
documentation:
[ KIT(R)eporter ]: Responsibilities -

* Processes and formats results received from KIT(E)
* Generates JSON report dump file if specified

classes.name: kaya_module_sdk.src.testing.kit_harness.KIT
documentation:
[ KIT(H)arness ]: Responsibilities -

* Parses and validates JSON integration test files
    * [ NOTE ]: If a directory is specified, looks for all *.json files
* Runs KIT(E) with test file data
* Runs KIT(R) with KIT(E) data
* Maintains a stable interface for KIT's backend

classes.name: kaya_module_sdk.src.testing.kvl_reporter.KVLR
documentation:
[ KVL(R)eporter ]: Responsibilities -

* Processes and formats results received from KVL(E)
* Generates JSON report dump file if specified

classes.name: kaya_module_sdk.src.testing.kvl_executer.KVLE

methods.name: kaya_module_sdk.src.testing.kvl_executer.KVLE.check_meta

documentation:
[ KVL(E)xecuter ]: Responsibilities -

* Runs all linters and checkers on the source code files
    [ Ex ]: pylint, flake8, mypy
* Imports all modules found in source code files
* Attempts extraction of Manifest from imported modules
* Verifies that required module metadata is properly set
* Checks module specific input data validators are properly set
* Collects all validation results in a easy to handle manner

classes.name: kaya_module_sdk.src.testing.kit_executer.KITE

methods.name: kaya_module_sdk.src.testing.kit_executer.KITE._execute
documentation: [ NOTE ]: Package and module names and version are declared directly in

[ KIT(E)xecuter ]: Responsibilities -

* Imports specified module
* Runs module with specified arguments
* Validates the return values, errors, and other details specified in test metadata
* Collects all test results in a easy to handle manner

classes.name: kaya_module_sdk.src.testing.kvl_harness.KVL

methods.name: kaya_module_sdk.src.testing.kvl_harness.KVL.check_rules
documentation:
[ NOTE ]: KVL(H) entry point for module constraints
verifications.

methods.name: kaya_module_sdk.src.testing.kvl_harness.KVL.check_meta
documentation: [ NOTE ]: KVL(H) entry point for module metadata verifications.

methods.name: kaya_module_sdk.src.testing.kvl_harness.KVL.check_source
documentation: [ NOTE ]: KVL(H) entry point for source code verifications.

methods.name: kaya_module_sdk.src.testing.kvl_harness.KVL.check
documentation:
[ INPUT ]:

    * Positional arguments:

    - *targets - type string, options (meta|source|rules|all)

    * Keyword arguments:

    - report= - type bool, format and display verification results
    - dump_report= - type bool, implies <report=True> - dumps report to file
    - module= - type str, implies <(meta|rules|all) in *targets> - module package name
    - file_path= - type str, implies <(source|all) in *targets> - python file or directory to check recursively

[ RETURN ]: KVL(R) report - type dict

[ NOTE ]: Main KVL(H) entry point/interface for all verification types.

[ KVL(H)arness ]: Responsibilities -

* Searches Python3 source code files
    [ NOTE ]: If a directory is specified, looks for all *.py files
* Runs KVL(E) with source file paths and/or module names depending on action
    When validating source code files it will receive the paths of the given files as strings
    When validating module input data at runtime it will receive the module name.
* Runs KVL(R) with KVL(E) data
* Maintains a stable interface for KVL's backend
